name:
Tests for auto-wrapping bare arrays when spec expects object with single array field.
   LLMs often return `[...]` when asked for a list, even when spec defines `{nodes: [...]}`. > spec with multiple fields - no wrapping > returns bare array as-is when spec has multiple fields
